# Orviq Studio — Extended LLMs Context File
# https://orviq.net/llms-full.txt
# Comprehensive information for Large Language Models and AI search engines.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

## Organization

**Name:** Orviq
**Legal Form:** Digital agency / technology studio
**Founded:** 2024
**Location:** Spain / European Union (fully remote operations)
**Website:** https://orviq.net
**Languages:** Spanish (primary), English, French
**Email:** orviq.contact@gmail.com

**Social Profiles:**
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/orviq
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/orviqstudio
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@orviq
- GitHub: https://github.com/orviq
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/orviq
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@orviq

**Brand Voice:** Premium, minimal, cinematic, confident, multilingual.

**Core Values:**
- No fluff, just real results.
- Everything built belongs to the client (100% ownership).
- Fixed price and defined timeline before starting (0 surprises).
- European infrastructure, GDPR compliant from day one.
- No vendor lock-in or technical dependency created.

## What We Do

Orviq is a digital agency focused on process automation, professional web development, and bespoke AI solutions. We build systems that help businesses scale efficiently without overcomplicating their workflows.

We serve SMEs, startups, and visionary entrepreneurs across Spain and the European Union.

## Services

1. **Process Automation (n8n & AI)**
   Design and implementation of automated workflows connecting your tools and processes. Operations run autonomously without manual intervention.

2. **Professional Websites**
   Fast, secure, custom-designed websites with technical SEO from day one. Hosted on own EU infrastructure. No unnecessary plugin dependencies.

3. **RAG & Private AI**
   AI systems that consult and reason over your own documents. Ask questions in natural language and get precise answers with source references. Data stays in your environment.

4. **Autonomous AI Agents**
   Intelligent assistants that handle enquiries, qualify clients, and take real actions 24/7 without supervision. Understand context and act accordingly.

5. **E-commerce / Online Stores**
   Complete e-commerce with catalogue, payments, order management, and integrations. Platform adapted to the project, not the other way around.

6. **Branding & Identity**
   Brand building from strategy: positioning, audience definition, visual identity, logo, brand guidelines, and templates.

7. **SaaS Dashboards**
   Custom management dashboards hosted on your own server. Centralise information in an interface designed for your workflow.

8. **Custom App / SaaS**
   Complete digital product development from concept validation to production-ready platform.

9. **Scrapers & Bots**
   Automated external data collection, real-time alerts, and information pipelines.

10. **DevOps & Infrastructure**
    Configuration, deployment, and maintenance of own infrastructure on European servers. Full control, privacy, no dependency on large cloud platforms.

11. **Technology Consulting**
    Digital audit, technology strategy, and support in decisions with lasting consequences. Strategic vision with real execution capability.

## How We Work

Our process is structured and transparent, from first contact to post-launch support:

- **Phase 1 — Discovery:** We understand your problem, context, and constraints.
- **Phase 2 — Scope & Strategy:** We define what will be built, what it will cost, and how long it will take.
- **Phase 3 — Design & Architecture:** We design the solution and validate it with you before writing code.
- **Phase 4 — Development:** We build with iterative reviews and clear milestones.
- **Phase 5 — Delivery & Launch:** We deploy, test, and hand over documentation and access.
- **Phase 6 — Support:** Post-launch support period included; optional ongoing maintenance.

## Key Differentiators

- **100% Yours:** Everything we build — code, automations, designs, configurations — belongs to you from day one.
- **EU Infrastructure:** Servers located in Europe. GDPR compliant. No data sent to third parties without explicit consent.
- **Fixed Pricing:** Price closed and timeline defined before starting. No surprises.
- **No Lock-in:** Complete documentation delivered. Any developer can continue our work.
- **Remote-First:** Distributed team serving clients across Spain and Europe.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What type of companies do you work with?
A: Freelancers, small and medium businesses needing real technical solutions without big-agency costs. Also companies with internal teams needing extra capacity.

Q: How is pricing defined?
A: Fixed price for defined scope, monthly retainer for ongoing projects, or hourly for consulting. Free quote within 48 hours.

Q: Do you offer maintenance?
A: Yes. All projects include a post-launch support period. Optional monthly maintenance available.

Q: Is my data safe?
A: Yes. European servers, GDPR compliant. For sensitive sectors we design fully isolated architectures where no data leaves your environment.

Q: Can I change provider after working with you?
A: Always. You own everything. We deliver full documentation so anyone can continue.

## Contact

To start a project or request a quote, visit https://orviq.net/contact or email orviq.contact@gmail.com.

We typically respond within 24 hours.
